profile.name: Idris Efendi
profile.title: Full Stack Developer & Automation Engineer
profile.tagline: I build efficient, scalable web applications and intelligent automation systems. Passionate about clean code, AI integration, and delivering impactful digital solutions.

seo.title: Idris Efendi — Full Stack Developer & Automation Engineer
seo.description: Portfolio dan CV Idris Efendi — Full Stack Developer, Automation Engineer, dan AI Enthusiast. Lihat project, skill, dan pengalaman kerja.

about.headline: A passionate developer who loves building things
description: I'm a Full Stack Developer based in Indonesia with expertise in building modern web applications, REST APIs, and automation systems. I specialize in PHP (Laravel), Python, JavaScript, and AI-powered tools. My goal is to create efficient, scalable, and user-friendly digital solutions.

With over 5 years of experience in software development, I've worked with startups and enterprises to deliver impactful products. I'm passionate about continuous learning and staying updated with the latest technologies.

experience.description: Lead development of enterprise web applications. Manage a team of 5 developers. Architected microservices infrastructure serving 100K+ users.
Developed and maintained multiple client projects. Built RESTful APIs and integrated third-party services. Implemented CI/CD pipelines.
Started career building WordPress and custom PHP websites. Learned agile methodologies and client communication skills.

portfolio.title: E-Commerce Platform
portfolio.description: Full-featured e-commerce with payment gateway, admin dashboard, and real-time inventory management.

portfolio.title: AI Customer Service Bot
portfolio.description: Intelligent chatbot using OpenAI API with context memory, multi-language support, and sentiment analysis.

portfolio.title: Automated Web Scraper
portfolio.description: Multi-source data scraping tool with scheduled runs, data cleaning pipeline, and export to CSV/JSON.

portfolio.title: Analytics Dashboard
portfolio.description: Real-time analytics dashboard with interactive charts, data filtering, and automated report generation.

portfolio.title: RESTful API Service
portfolio.description: Scalable API microservice with JWT auth, rate limiting, caching, and comprehensive Swagger documentation.

portfolio.title: This Portfolio Website
portfolio.description: Modern, responsive portfolio built with vanilla HTML/CSS/JS and Tailwind CSS. Zero dependencies, instant load.

testimonials.name: Sarah Johnson
testimonials.text: John delivered our e-commerce platform ahead of schedule. His attention to detail and technical skills are outstanding. Highly recommended for any web development project.

testimonials.name: Michael Chen
testimonials.text: Working with John was a great experience. He built an AI chatbot that handles 80% of our customer inquiries. His automation skills saved us countless hours.

testimonials.name: Emily Rodriguez
testimonials.text: John's API development is top-notch. Clean code, excellent documentation, and reliable performance. He's become our go-to developer for backend work.

contact.headline: Let's work together
contact.description: Have a project in mind or want to discuss an opportunity? I'd love to hear from you. Send me a message and I'll get back to you as soon as possible.

footer.tagline: Full Stack Developer & Automation Engineer building efficient digital solutions.
